acquisition method: The instrument was operated in data-dependent acquisition (DDA) mode
alkylation reagent: alkylated in the dark with iodoacetamide (1,560 nmol, 30 min, 25 °C)
alkylation concentration: alkylated in the dark with iodoacetamide (1,560 nmol, 30 min, 25 °C)
cleavage agent: digested with trypsin (in a protein:enzyme ratio of 10:1)
collision energy: selected for fragmentation at normalized collision energy of 28%
enrichment method: Samples were enriched for phosphopeptides with the Pierce TiO2 Phosphopeptide Enrichment kit
fragmentation method: Fragment ion spectra produced via high-energy collision dissociation (HCD)
instrument: an Orbitrap Fusion Lumos mass spectrometer
